title: Basic Portal Gun
description: This Datapack adds a craftable Portal Gun into your game!
body:
**Adds a fully functional Portal Gun. Craft it using a slightly expensive recipe, right click to shoot an orange portal, then sneak right click to shoot a blue portal**

**_particles may cause lower frame rates_**

![Portal Gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd937bb9bf0e8b354738dc427c91c01388949997.png)
